decisionTree.description: Answer a few simple questions to find the right Incoterm for your shipment. Based on Incoterms 2020 rules.

EXW.name: Ex Works
EXW.description: The seller makes the goods available at their premises. The buyer bears all costs and risks from that point.
complianceRisks: Buyer is responsible for export clearance in seller's country

FOB.name: Free on Board
FOB.description: Risk passes when goods are loaded on the vessel at the port of shipment. Seller handles export clearance.
complianceRisks: Risk transfers at port of loading

CFR.name: Cost and Freight
CFR.description: Seller pays for freight to destination port. Risk passes at port of loading.

CIF.name: Cost Insurance Freight
CIF.description: CFR plus insurance. Seller pays freight and insurance to destination port.
complianceRisks: Risk still transfers at loading port

FCA.name: Free Carrier
FCA.description: Seller delivers goods to carrier at named place. Used for all transport modes.
complianceRisks: Carrier must be named in contract
Risk transfers upon delivery to carrier

FAS.name: Free Alongside Ship
FAS.description: Seller delivers goods alongside the vessel at port of shipment.
complianceRisks: Buyer responsible for loading onto vessel

CPT.name: Carriage Paid To
CPT.description: Seller pays for carriage to destination. Risk passes to buyer when goods handed to carrier.

CIP.name: Carriage and Insurance Paid To
CIP.description: CPT plus insurance. Seller pays for carriage and insurance to destination.

DAP.name: Delivered at Place
DAP.description: Seller delivers goods to named place of destination, ready for unloading.
complianceRisks: Buyer responsible for import clearance and duties

DPU.name: Delivered at Place Unloaded
DPU.description: Seller delivers goods unloaded at named place of destination.
complianceRisks: Seller responsible for unloading at destination

DDP.name: Delivered Duty Paid
DDP.description: Seller delivers goods to buyer's premises, paying all costs including duties and taxes.
complianceRisks: Requires seller to handle import clearance in buyer's country
